rights_basis: Bram Stoker died in 1912 and Dracula was first published in 1897; Tier A requires verified public-domain source text and Project Gutenberg license evidence.

issues: Tier C rights block all publishing.
verification_status must be approved before publishing.

blocked_reason: Source text is required before Dracula can be approved.; BLOCKED_SOURCE_TEXT_REQUIRED; Project Gutenberg source license was not deterministically verified from source text.; source_hash, content_hash, and provenance_hash are required.
